# Water Control

**Summary**: Techniques used to reduce or eliminate water production from a well.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] investigated methods for water-control in high temperature and salinity environments.

## Scientific Context

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] Water production is a major cost and environmental risk factor in oilfield operations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] Evaluation of gel strength and cross-linking kinetics.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Emulsified gels were proposed as a method for disproportionate permeability reduction (DPR). ([[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014, p. 112]])
